overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a Western-themed video game showing a character in period attire exploring a rainy New Orleans-style courtyard at night, passing through interior spaces and emerging onto a historic street with gas lamp lighting and wet reflective surfaces.

scene_state.functional_zone: courtyard with fountain and outdoor dining

agents.ego_description: walking through a rainy courtyard past a stone fountain and outdoor seating areas with lit candles

entered.detail: large stone fountain with water feature in the center of the courtyard
wooden table with chairs and a lit candle on top
decorative black iron balcony on the second floor of the building
tall cast iron post with glowing gas lamp
large tropical plants in stone planters

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a rainy courtyard at night, passing a central stone fountain and outdoor dining tables with candles. The area is surrounded by historic buildings with wrought iron balconies, illuminated by warm gas lamps reflecting off the wet paved ground.

scene_state.functional_zone: building interior passage and balcony porch

events.description: character enters building through arched doorway transitioning from outdoor courtyard to interior
character exits the building onto a covered wooden porch overlooking the courtyard

agents.ego_description: entering a building through an arched doorway, passing through a dimly lit interior, and stepping onto a covered porch with wicker furniture

entered.detail: stone archway with wooden double doors
dark wooden door with glass panels
white painted wooden railing along the porch edge
woven wicker armchair on the porch

segments.scene_description: The character moves from the rainy courtyard into a building through an arched doorway, traverses a dim interior space, and emerges onto a covered wooden porch furnished with wicker chairs, overlooking the courtyard below.

scene_state.functional_zone: courtyard patio with outdoor furniture and tropical plants

agents.ego_description: walking around the courtyard perimeter, passing tables with closed umbrellas and potted plants, heading toward a building entrance

entered.detail: large canvas patio umbrella folded down
upholstered outdoor seating with cushions under an archway
rectangular stone container with flowering plants
white wooden lattice structure against the building wall
ornamental wall-mounted gas lantern glowing warmly

segments.scene_description: The character explores the ground level of the courtyard, walking past closed patio umbrellas, stone planters with tropical vegetation, and outdoor sofas arranged under archways. Warm gas lanterns mounted on the walls illuminate the wet stone pathways.

events.description: lighting dims significantly as character moves deeper into the covered corridor

agents.ego_description: walking through a dark narrow passage between buildings, approaching a doorway leading to the street outside

entered.detail: stone arch forming the entrance to the narrow passage
narrow opening between two buildings leading to darkness
single dim light fixture on the corridor wall

segments.scene_description: The character enters a narrow, dark corridor between buildings, leaving the open courtyard behind. The passage is dimly lit by a single wall sconce, with stone walls on either side, leading toward a visible exit at the far end.

scene_state.functional_zone: historic urban street with balconies and street lamps

events.description: character exits the corridor onto a rainy city street with visible pedestrians
character turns right to follow the sidewalk along the street

agents.ego_description: walking along a wet city sidewalk at night, passing other pedestrians and historic buildings with illuminated windows and cast iron balconies

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in dark clothing walking ahead on the sidewalk
pedestrian leaning against the building wall near shuttered windows

entered.detail: tall cast iron street lamp with glowing light
elevated wooden plank walkway in front of buildings
metal post for tying horses along the curb
red brick building front with shuttered windows
ornate black iron balcony on upper floor of building

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from the corridor onto a rainy historic street, joining sparse pedestrian traffic on the wet sidewalk. Gas street lamps illuminate the brick building facades and cast iron balconies while the character walks past other pedestrians and hitching posts along the curb.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a rainy, lamp-lit courtyard through a series of interior passages and finally onto a historic city street. It begins by gliding past a central stone fountain and candlelit dining tables, where warm gas lamps reflect off the wet pavement beneath wrought iron balconies. As the character moves through an arched doorway into a dim interior, the perspective shifts across a covered wooden porch with wicker chairs before descending back to the ground level to pass tropical vegetation and outdoor sofas. The scene then narrows as the camera enters a dark stone corridor lit by a single wall sconce, leaving the open courtyard behind. Finally, the path opens up as the character emerges from the passage onto a rainy brick street, joining sparse pedestrian traffic under the glow of street lamps and cast iron balconies.
